beIN SPORTS 3.title_fr: Real Sociedad vs Alavés - LaLiga espagnole 2025/26 - 31e journée
beIN SPORTS 3.desc_en: Real Sociedad have not won any of their last two home games against Alavés in LaLiga  and have only once gone three consecutive home matches without a win against the Vitoria side in the top-flight, between 1999 and 2002. Deportivo Alavés have won their last three games against Real Sociedad in LaLiga; they have only managed to win four consecutive matches against three teams in the entire history of the competition: UD Las Palmas in 2001, CD Tenerife in 2002 and Real Valladolid in 2003.
beIN SPORTS 3.desc_fr: La Real Sociedad n'a remporté aucun de ses deux derniers matchs à domicile contre Alavés en Liga et n'a disputé qu'une seule fois trois matches consécutifs à domicile sans victoire contre l'équipe de Vitoria dans l'élite, entre 1999 et 2002. Le Deportivo Alavés a remporté ses trois derniers matchs contre la Real Sociedad en Liga ;

beIN SPORTS 3.title_fr: Elche vs Valence - LaLiga espagnole 2025/26 - 31ème journée
beIN SPORTS 3.desc_en: Elche CF have picked up points in three of their last seven LaLiga matches against Valencia, after doing so in just two of their previous 13 top-flight encounters. Valencia CF have won seven of their last nine away LaLiga matches against Elche, after managing just two victories in their first 15 visits to the Franjiverde's home ground in the top-flight.
beIN SPORTS 3.desc_fr: L'Elche CF a récolté des points lors de trois de ses sept derniers matches de Liga contre Valence, après l'avoir fait lors de seulement deux de ses 13 précédentes rencontres de haut niveau.

beIN SPORTS 3.original_title: Barcelona vs Espanyol - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31

beIN SPORTS 3.title_fr: Barcelone vs Espanyol - LaLiga espagnole 2025/26 - 31ème journée
beIN SPORTS 3.desc_en: FC Barcelona are unbeaten in their last 29 LaLiga matches against Espanyol, their longest unbeaten run against a single opponent and the longest unbeaten run by a team in any derby in the competition's history. RCD Espanyol have not won an away LaLiga match against FC Barcelona since February 2009 under Mauricio Pochettino. Since then, Espanyol have only picked up one point in their following 14 visits to the Camp Nou in the competition : a 1-1 draw in December 2022.
beIN SPORTS 3.desc_fr: Le FC Barcelone est invaincu lors de ses 29 derniers matches de Liga contre l'Espanyol, sa plus longue série d'invincibilité contre un seul adversaire et la plus longue série d'invincibilité d'une équipe dans un derby de l'histoire de la compétition.

beIN SPORTS 3.title_fr: Osasuna vs Real Betis - LaLiga espagnole 2025/26 - 31ème journée
beIN SPORTS 3.desc_en: Osasuna have won just one of their last 15 LaLiga matches against Real Betis, a 3-2 victory in April 2023, suffering as many defeats as in their previous 32 top-flight encounters. Real Betis Balompié have won four of their last five away LaLiga matches against Osasuna, including the last two. The Verdiblancos have never won three consecutive away games against the Rojillos in the competition's history.

beIN SPORTS 3.desc_en: Mallorca have not lost any of their 11 home games against Rayo Vallecano in LaLiga, and have not played more home matches without suffering a defeat against any other opponent in their entire top-flight history. Following their 2-1 victory in Vallecas in January 2026, Rayo Vallecano have the chance to complete a league double over Mallorca for the first time in LaLiga history.
beIN SPORTS 3.desc_fr: Majorque n'a perdu aucun de ses 11 matchs à domicile contre le Rayo Vallecano en Liga, et n'a pas disputé plus de matches à domicile sans subir de défaite contre un autre adversaire dans toute son histoire de haut niveau.

beIN SPORTS 3.title_fr: Bayern München vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarts de Finale - Match retour
beIN SPORTS 3.desc_en: Bayern Munich’s victory in the first leg ended a nine-game winless run for them against Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League. Only once before have they won both legs of a knockout stage tie against them in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, doing so in the 2000-01 semi-finals. Since the start of the 2013-14 season, Real Madrid  have the joint-most away wins against Bayern Munich across all competitions, despite only playing there four times in this period.
beIN SPORTS 3.desc_fr: La victoire du Bayern Munich au match aller a mis fin à une série de neuf matchs sans victoire contre le Real Madrid en UEFA Champions League.

beIN SPORTS 5.title_fr: Nottingham Forest vs Burnley - Premier League anglaise 2025/2026 33ème journée
beIN SPORTS 5.desc_en: Nottingham Forest have won just one of their last eight league games against Burnley, beating them 2-1 at Turf Moor in May 2024. Burnley have won just two of their last 21 away league games against Nottingham Forest. Each of their last three visits has finished 1-1, with this season’s reverse fixture also finishing by that scoreline.
beIN SPORTS 5.desc_fr: Nottingham Forest n'a remporté qu'un seul de ses huit derniers matches de championnat contre Burnley, les battant 2-1 à Turf Moor en mai 2024. Burnley n'a remporté que deux de ses 21 derniers matches de championnat à l'extérieur contre Nottingham Forest.

beIN SPORTS 5.title_fr: Athletic Bilbao vs Osasuna - LaLiga espagnole 2025/26 - 33ème journée
beIN SPORTS 5.desc_en: Athletic Club are unbeaten in their last five LaLiga matches against Osasuna, drawing the last two. Only once have the Basque side recorded three consecutive draws against Osasuna in the competition's history, between 1989 and 1990. Osasuna have drawn on their last three visits to San Mamés in LaLiga; only two teams have recorded four or more consecutive away draws against Athletic Club in the competition's history: FC Barcelona between 1966 and 1970  and Getafe between 2022 and 2024.
beIN SPORTS 5.desc_fr: L'Athletic Club est invaincu lors de ses cinq derniers matches de Liga contre Osasuna, faisant match nul lors des deux derniers.

beIN SPORTS 5.title_fr: Gérone vs Real Betis - LaLiga espagnole 2025/26 - 33e journée
beIN SPORTS 5.desc_en: Girona FC have won just 9.1% of their LaLiga games against Real Betis, their lowest win rate against any opponent they have faced at least five times in the top-flight. Real Betis Balompié have won four of their five LaLiga visits to Estadi Municipal de Montilivi, with only Villarreal  achieving more away wins against Girona in the top-flight.
beIN SPORTS 5.desc_fr: Le FC Gérone n'a remporté que 9,1 % de ses matchs de Liga contre le Real Betis, soit son taux de victoire le plus bas contre un adversaire qu'il a affronté au moins cinq fois dans l'élite.

beIN SPORTS 7.title_fr: Limoges vs Paris - LNH Division 1 - Starligue Française de Handball
beIN SPORTS 7.desc_en: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s  14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.
beIN SPORTS 7.desc_fr: Plongez dans l'effervescence du handball français avec la Liqui Moly Starligue, anciennement LNH Division 1. Créée en 1952, cet événement de première division rassemble 16 meilleures équipes qui se battent pour la gloire.

beIN SPORTS 7.desc: انغمس في إثارة كرة اليد الفرنسية مع Liqui Moly Starligue، القسم الأول من LNH سابقًا. تأسس هذا الحدث في الدوري الممتاز عام 1952، ويضم 16 فريقًا من أفضل الفرق يتقاتلون من أجل المجد.
beIN SPORTS 7.title_fr: Nantes vs Montpellier - LNH Division 1 - Starligue Française de Handball
beIN SPORTS 7.desc_en: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s  14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.
beIN SPORTS 7.desc_fr: Plongez dans l'effervescence du handball français avec la Liqui Moly Starligue, anciennement LNH Division 1. Créée en 1952, cet événement de première division rassemble 16 meilleures équipes qui se battent pour la gloire.

beIN SPORTS 7.desc_en: Held from 13–19 April at the Real Club de Tennis Barcelona, this ATP 500 clay-court event marks a key stage of the European clay swing. Featuring a 32-player singles draw, it offers around €2.8m in prize money, with top-ranked players competing for 500 ranking points ahead of the major clay-court tournaments.
beIN SPORTS 7.desc_fr: Organisé du 13 au 19 avril au Real Club de Tennis de Barcelone, cet événement ATP 500 sur terre battue marque une étape clé du swing européen sur terre battue.

beIN SPORTS 7.title_fr: Roman Andres Burruchaga (ARG) vs Tommy Paul (USA) – Jour 7 – ATP 250 Fayez Sarofim & Co. U.S. Men's C
beIN SPORTS 7.desc_en: Staged in Houston, this is the only ATP clay event in North America and is played on American green clay, which is faster and lower bouncing than European red clay. The conditions favor big servers and first-strike tennis, making it a unique transition event into the clay-court season.
beIN SPORTS 7.desc_fr: Organisé à Houston, il s'agit du seul événement ATP sur terre battue en Amérique du Nord et se joue sur la terre battue verte américaine, qui rebondit plus rapidement et avec moins de rebond que la terre battue rouge européenne.

beIN SPORTS 4.title_fr: Nantes vs Brest - Ligue 1 française 2025/2026 30ème journée
beIN SPORTS 4.desc_en: Nantes have not won any of their last six Ligue 1 matches against Brest, having never gone more than two top-flight games without a win against this opponent before this run. Nantes have lost their last two home Ligue 1 games against Brest, after losing only one of their first 13 such matches.

beIN SPORTS 4.title_fr: Metz vs Paris FC - Ligue 1 française 2025/2026 30ème journée
beIN SPORTS 4.desc_en: Metz have won 68% of their matches against Paris FC in all competitions, their highest ratio against any opponent they have faced at least 15 times. There has never been a draw in seven Ligue 1 meetings between the two teams, with these encounters producing an average of four goals per game. Metz have scored in each of their last 17 matches against Paris FC in all competitions  and have not failed to find the net against them since May 1973 in Ligue 1.
beIN SPORTS 4.desc_fr: Metz a remporté 68% de ses matchs contre le Paris FC toutes compétitions confondues, soit son ratio le plus élevé contre un adversaire qu'il a affronté au moins 15 fois.

Lorient have won just 12% of their home games against Olympique de Marseille in Ligue 1, their lowest win rate against a team they have hosted more than ten times in the top-flight.

beIN SPORTS 6.desc: لم يخسر ريال نادي ديبورتيفو مايوركا في آخر ثلاث مباريات على أرضه أمام فالنسيا في الدوري الإسباني، بينما لم يسبق له أن خاض أربع مباريات متتالية على أرضه دون هزيمة أمامه في تاريخ المسابقة.
beIN SPORTS 6.title_fr: Majorque vs Valence - Liga espagnole 2025/26 - 33e journée
beIN SPORTS 6.desc_en: Real Club Deportivo Mallorca are unbeaten in their last three home games against Valencia CF in LaLiga, while they have never gone four consecutive home matches without defeat against them in the competition's history. Valencia CF are unbeaten in their last two meetings with Real Club Deportivo Mallorca in LaLiga, and have not gone longer without defeat against them in the competition since March 2012.
beIN SPORTS 6.desc_fr: Le Real Club Deportivo Majorque est invaincu lors de ses trois derniers matchs à domicile contre le Valencia CF en Liga, alors qu'il n'a jamais disputé quatre matches consécutifs à domicile sans défaite contre lui dans l'histoire de la compétition.

beIN SPORTS 1.title: بايرن ميونخ vs ريال مدريد - دوري أبطال أوروبا 2025/26 - ربع النهائي - مباراة الذهاب
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: أنهى فوز بايرن ميونخ في مباراة الذهاب سلسلة من تسع مباريات بدون فوز لهم أمام ريال مدريد في دوري أبطال أوروبا.
beIN SPORTS 1.title_fr: Bayern München vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarts de Finale - Match retour
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_en: Bayern Munich’s victory in the first leg ended a nine-game winless run for them against Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League. Only once before have they won both legs of a knockout stage tie against them in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, doing so in the 2000-01 semi-finals. Since the start of the 2013-14 season, Real Madrid  have the joint-most away wins against Bayern Munich across all competitions, despite only playing there four times in this period.
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_fr: La victoire du Bayern Munich au match aller a mis fin à une série de neuf matchs sans victoire contre le Real Madrid en UEFA Champions League.

All 380 matches from the English Premier league are live and exclusive only on beIN.
All matches are available live with a choice of Arabic or English commentary.
The season will consist of 33 weekends and five midweek rounds of matches.
Liverpool are the defending champions, having won their second Premier League title.

beIN SPORTS 1.original_title: Real Madrid  vs Deportivo Alaves - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 33
beIN SPORTS 1.title: ريال مدريد vs ديبورتيفو ألافيس - الدوري الإسباني 2025/26 - الأسبوع 33
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: فاز ريال مدريد بمبارياته الثماني الأخيرة ضد ألافيس في الدوري الإسباني ويمكن أن يعادل أفضل سلسلة انتصارات متتالية ضد فريق فيتوريا في تاريخ المسابقة، والتي تم تحقيقها بين عامي 2002 و2018. بعد انتصاراته في مايو 2000 ونوفمبر 2020، أصبح ألافيس أول فريق خارج أرضه يفوز على ريال مدريد في كل من ملعبي بيرنابيو وألفريدو دي ستيفانو في الدوري الإسباني.
beIN SPORTS 1.title_fr: Real Madrid vs Deportivo Alavés - Liga espagnole 2025/26 - 33ème journée
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_en: Real Madrid have won their last eight matches against Alavés in LaLiga and could equal their best run of consecutive victories against the Vitoria side in the competition's history, achieved between 2002 and 2018. Following their victories in May 2000  and November 2020, Alavés became the first away team to beat Real Madrid at both the Estadio Bernabéu and the Alfredo Di Stéfano in LaLiga. Levante later achieved this feat, winning 0-1 in 2007 and 1-2 in 2018 at Estadio Bernabéu, and 1-2 in 2021 at Alfredo Di Stéfano.
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_fr: Le Real Madrid a remporté ses huit derniers matches contre Alavés en Liga et pourrait égaler sa meilleure série de victoires consécutives contre Vitoria dans l'histoire de la compétition, réalisée entre 2002 et 2018. Après ses victoires de mai 2000 et novembre 2020, Alavés est devenu la première équipe à l'extérieur à battre le Real Madrid, tant au stade Bernabéu qu'à Alfredo Di Stéfano en Liga.

beIN SPORTS 1.original_title: Zamalek SC (EGY) vs CR Belouizdad (ALG) - CAF Confederation Cup 2025/26 - SF - 2nd LEG
beIN SPORTS 1.title: الزمالك (مصر) vs شباب بلوزداد (الج) - CAF كأس الكونفيدرالية 2025/26 - SF - الجولة الثانية
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: كأس الاتحاد الأفريقي هي مسابقة الدرجة الثانية لكرة القدم للأندية الأفريقية، وتحتل مرتبة أقل من دوري أبطال أفريقيا.
beIN SPORTS 1.title_fr: Zamalek SC (EGY) vs CR Belouizdad (ALG) - Coupe de la Confédération de la CAF 2025/26 - SF - 2ème LEG
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_en: The CAF Confederation Cup is the second-tier competition of African club football, ranking below the CAF Champions League. Both competitions are live and exclusive only on beIN. Current champions re RS Berkane from Morocco.
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_fr: La Coupe de la Confédération de la CAF est la compétition de deuxième niveau du football interclubs africain, se classant en dessous de la Ligue des Champions de la CAF.

beIN SPORTS 1.original_title: RS Berkane (MAR) vs AS FAR (MAR) - CAF Champions League 2025/26 - SF2  2nd LEG
beIN SPORTS 1.title: نهضة بركان (المغرب) vs الجيش الملكي (المغرب) - دوري أبطال أفريقيا 2025/26 - الجولة الثانية من دوري الدرجة الأولى الفرنسي
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: دوري أبطال أفريقيا، هي مسابقة كرة قدم سنوية للأندية ينظمها الاتحاد الأفريقي لكرة القدم (CAF) وتتنافس عليها أندية الدرجة الأولى الأفريقية.
beIN SPORTS 1.title_fr: RS Berkane (MAR) vs AS FAR (MAR) - Ligue des Champions de la CAF 2025/26 - SF2 2ème LEG
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_en: The CAF Champions League, is an annual club football competition organized by the Confederation of African Football (CAF) and contested by top-division African clubs. It is the most prestigious club competition in African football and is live and exclusive only on beIN. The current champions are Pyramids Football Club from Egypt.
beIN SPORTS 1.desc_fr: La Ligue des champions de la CAF est une compétition annuelle de football interclubs organisée par la Confédération africaine de football (CAF) et disputée par les clubs africains de première division.
